reviews.review_description: I love this game I play this everyday and I love to create content and black this game everyday it’s fun for all ages 🔥🔥🔥🤩🤩🤩🤩

This game is so freaking fun to play! The graphics are incredible! The best app in the app store 👈🫡 2 thumbs up, and 5 stars are hands down🫡 the only thing that's missing from this app is a setting to turn on or off the music.maybe add a lobby to find other players to play with. I love the animation of the commode. The music is too loud, so I just turn it way down on my headset. I can't wait to see what the next update will bring. Keep it the good work, Devs.

developer_response.body:
Hi!

Thank you for your review and your feedback. 🙏🏻
We're glad you enjoy it!

Your feedback has been heard and things will be adjusted in the next update!🙌🏻

Best,
Poly Tool Support Team
